info.description:
Registry-first API for immutable skill publication, indexed search candidate
retrieval, direct relationship reads, exact version retrieval, artifact streaming,
and version listing.

The server owns data-local registry operations only. Prompt interpretation,
reranking, dependency solving, final selection, lock generation, and execution
planning remain client-owned behavior outside this API boundary.
info.title: aptitude-server Service

get.description: Return compact advisory candidates from indexed metadata and description search. This route is discovery-only: it does not resolve relationships, choose a final candidate, or perform dependency solving.

parameters.description: Repeatable tag filter; all values must match.
parameters.name: tag

schema.description: Repeatable tag filter; all values must match.
schema.title: Tag

parameters.description: Language alias filter implemented as a normalized tag.
parameters.name: language

schema.description: Language alias filter implemented as a normalized tag.
schema.title: Language

parameters.description: Maximum age in days since publication.
parameters.name: fresh_within_days

schema.description: Maximum age in days since publication.
schema.title: Fresh Within Days

parameters.description: Maximum allowed markdown size in bytes.
parameters.name: max_content_size_bytes

schema.description: Maximum allowed markdown size in bytes.
schema.title: Max Content Size Bytes

parameters.description: Maximum number of skill candidates to return.
parameters.name: limit

schema.description: Maximum number of skill candidates to return.
schema.title: Limit

200.description: Compact advisory skill candidates returned successfully.

errors.msg: Value error, At least one search selector must be provided.

get.description: Return process liveness for lightweight probes.
Return dependency readiness, including a database connectivity check.

post.description: Return authored direct `depends_on` and `extends` relationships for exact immutable source versions. This route does not expand transitive graphs, select versions for constraints, or emit solved dependency closures.

200.description: Ordered direct relationship results returned successfully.

422.description: The relationship query request is invalid.

post.description: Create a new immutable skill version from a normalized JSON payload containing markdown content, structured metadata, and authored relationships.

content.raw_markdown:
# Python Lint

Lint Python files consistently.

422.description: The request body, path parameters, or query parameters are invalid.

error.message: Failed to persist immutable skill version.

500.description: Normalized content or metadata persistence failed.

get.description: Return the normalized identity row for a skill slug.

parameters.description: Stable public slug of the skill.
parameters.name: slug

schema.description: Stable public slug of the skill.
schema.title: Slug

404.description: The requested skill slug does not exist.

422.description: The request body, path parameters, or query parameters are invalid.
